description:
Re-review and rewrite legal/privacy copy against the new thin-platform architecture.

**Scope**
- Update `/privacy`, `/terms`, NPP language, and any compliance copy that currently implies Apoth stores broad clinical intake PHI.
- Make the posture clear: Apoth owns identity, commerce orchestration, intake UI, and minimal linkage/status records; MDI is the clinical system of record.
- Preserve attorney review via `LegalReviewBanner` until signed off.
- Confirm all-50-states, pharmacy, refund, HIPAA/BAA, and dashboard promises are accurate.

**Acceptance**
- Attorney-facing diff or checklist is ready for review.
- Copy no longer overstates local clinical storage or provider responsibilities.
- Any required counsel changes are filed as follow-up issues/tickets.
title: Thin-PHI legal copy re-review
